steps.title: Identify the advantage mentioned in the notes
steps.content:
The notes state one specific advantage for Antelope House: “The overhanging rock ledges offered protection from heavy rain and snow.” This is the only advantage mentioned about Antelope House in the notes.

The task requires explaining this advantage, not just stating facts about the site.

steps.title: Apply the advantage to the choices
steps.content:
Choice D directly uses this information: it explains that the rock overhang caused the protection from rain and snow.

Choices A and B either misattribute features (flat terrain belongs to Mud Springs, not Antelope House) or state only basic facts without identifying any advantage; Choice C mentions an advantage exists but fails to explain what it actually is.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
